segments.text: My son, pay attention to my wisdom; Lend your ear to my understanding,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: That you may preserve discretion, And your lips may keep knowledge.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For the lips of an immoral woman drip honey, And her mouth is smoother than oil;
But in the end she is bitter as wormwood, Sharp as a two-edged sword.
Her feet go down to death, Her steps lay hold of hell.
Lest you ponder her path of life— Her ways are unstable; You do not know them.
Therefore hear me now, my children, And do not depart from the words of my mouth.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Remove your way far from her, And do not go near the door of her house,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Lest you give your honor to others, And your years to the cruel one;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Lest aliens be filled with your wealth, And your labors go to the house of a foreigner;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: And you mourn at last, When your flesh and your body are consumed,
How I have hated instruction, And my heart despised correction!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I have not obeyed the voice of my teachers, Nor inclined my ear to those who instructed me!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I was on the verge of total ruin, In the midst of the assembly and congregation.
Drink water from your own cistern, And running water from your own well.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Should your fountains be dispersed abroad, Streams of water in the streets?
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Let them be only your own, And not for strangers with you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Let your fountain be blessed, And rejoice with the wife of your youth.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: As a loving deer and a graceful doe, Let her breasts satisfy you at all times; And always be enraptured with her love.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For why should you, my son, be enraptured by an immoral woman, And be embraced in the arms of a seductress?
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For the ways of man are before the eyes of the Lord, And He ponders all his paths.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: His own iniquities entrap the wicked man, And he is caught in the cords of his sin.
He shall die for lack of instruction, And in the greatness of his folly he shall go astray.
